site.name: Taghazout Cooking Class
site.description: Book your Taghazout cooking class — an authentic Berber village cooking experience in the Atlas Mountains. Learn tagine, clay oven bread, and amlou with Rabab. Pickup from Taghazout included.

metadata.title: Taghazout Cooking Class - Authentic Moroccan & Amazigh Cooking Experience
metadata.description: Book your Taghazout cooking class — half-day Berber village experience with pickup included. Learn traditional tagine, clay oven bread, and amlou in the Atlas Mountains above Taghazout.
metadata.author: Rabab - Taghazout Cooking Class
